sections_cited: section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Income Tax Reference Application No. 297, 298 & 299 of 2023 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection No. 26. 2. For orders on CMA No. 427/2023 (Exemption) 3. For hearing of main case. 15.12.2025 Mr. Munawwar Ali Memon, advocate for applicant. Per learned counsel, the questions framed have already been decided against the applicant department vide judgment rendered by the Division Bench of this Court in ITRA No. 121/2015. In view hereof, he states these references may be dismissed as withdrawn. Order accordingly. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. Office is instructed to place copy of this order in the connected files. Judge Judge Ayaz P.S.
